sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince HPR formula for short options: position size determined by optimal f* parameter, current option price (S), probability of profit P(T,U), and expected outcome Z(T,U-Y). Specific f* value not provided in excerpt; requires backtesting to determine. Formula: HPR(T,U) = (1+f*(1-Z(T,U-Y)/S))^P(T,U)

source_rule_text: For short option positions, adjust position sizing based on the HPR formula which incorporates the tested optimal f value, current option price, and probability of profit over the holding period.
